name: Ambient Clinical Documentation Assistant
description: Ambient AI that listens to physician-patient encounters and drafts clinical notes (assessment, plan, medications) into the EHR for physician review and sign-off.
intended_purpose: Reduce physician documentation burden by auto-drafting clinical notes from encounter audio, physician retains sign-off authority.
purpose: Processing of patient encounter audio and health data to generate draft clinical documentation.
affected_persons: Patients whose encounters are recorded and documented.
model_type: Speech-to-text plus generative LLM for clinical note drafting
autonomy_level: Human-in-the-loop; physician must review and sign off before the note enters the permanent record
decisions_supported: downstream clinical decisions relying on the record
retention_period: per medical records retention law, typically 7-10+ years
security_measures: encryption at rest and in transit
